description_long: This armchair features a rounded, enveloping backrest and armrests that seamlessly curve into each other, creating a cocoon-like seating experience. The upholstery is a soft, light gray fabric with a subtle hexagonal pattern on the seat and a faint, textured weave on the back and sides. A large, plush cushion sits against the backrest, providing additional comfort and support. The chair is elevated on four slender, gold-colored metal legs that add a touch of elegance and modernity. The overall silhouette is contemporary, with smooth, continuous lines and a generous, inviting seat. The materials and construction suggest a comfortable, high-quality piece suitable for both indoor and semi-sheltered urban environments.
description: A modern, rounded armchair with light gray textured upholstery, a plush back cushion, and slender gold metal legs. The seat features a subtle hexagonal pattern, and the overall design is both elegant and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved backrest, plush cushion, and hexagonal patterned seat with gold legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the continuous curve of the backrest and armrest, as well as the depth of the seat and cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back with subtle fabric texture and the gold legs peeking out below.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the chair's enveloping shape and the plushness of the seat and backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, continuous with backrest, rounded shape
attribute_backrest_style: rounded, medium-high, fully upholstered with a plush cushion
attribute_leg_type: slender, angled metal legs with gold finish
attribute_upholstery_pattern: hexagonal pattern on seat, subtle textured weave on back and sides
